text:
Melanin Lizard (メラニントカゲ, Meranin Tokage) is a card found in the Greed Island game. This is a standard card that can be obtained by the player. These cards can be placed in the player's "Free Slots".
__NOTOC__

| colspan="3" align="center" |Summons forth a Melanin Lizard. A very large creature big enough to eat a cow whole.
|
|-

| colspan="3" align="center" |By finding one and defeating it in battle.
|
|}

Summary

The Melanin Lizard roams the Greed Island Badlands in search of prey to devour.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.697 :: 
牛を丸飲みするほど巨大なトカゲ。押されるだけで気絶してしまう程、敏感なホクロが背中のどこかに１つあり、それを隠すために大小様々な斑点でカムフラージュしている。
|-
![Eng]
|No.697 :: Melanin Lizard 
A lizard large enough to swallow a cow whole. It has one mole on its back so sensitive that it will pass out when pressed. Numerous other spots camouflage the mole.
|}
